highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.116.0 is the first stable v3 release — Skia m116, WinUI accelerated views, .NET 8/9, and the [Obsolete] cleanup.
highlights_body: It rolls up the entire 3.0.0 preview line and adds multi-thread/SIMD WebAssembly builds, `SKMatrix.MapPoints`/`MapVectors` and `SKPath.AddPoly` `Span<SKPoint>` overloads, and the .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor hosting fixes. This is a breaking release — see the changes below before upgrading.

breaking.title: All previously [Obsolete] members and types are removed
breaking.body: Every member and type that was marked `[Obsolete]` before v3 has been removed from the surface. Move to the replacement APIs that the obsolete messages pointed at — text metrics and drawing move to `SKFont` and `SKTextBlob`, and `FilterQuality` moves to `SKSamplingOptions`. Compatibility overloads for `SKFilterQuality` are kept where possible.

bullets.detail: Updates the bundled Skia to milestone 116 as the baseline for the first stable v3 release.
Rolls HarfBuzz to 7.3.0 then 8.3.0, WebP to 1.3.2, and updates libjpeg-turbo (rolling back the 3.0.0 attempt to 2.1.5.1 for stability).

bullets.lead: WinUI accelerated views and WPF SKGLElement
bullets.detail: Adds support for WinUI accelerated views alongside the existing XAML canvas, and adds `SKGLElement` to `SkiaSharp.Views.WPF` for GPU-accelerated WPF hosting.
Adds `SKImage.ToRawShader` for unpremultiplied image shaders, and exposes `SKBlender` as a first-class type on `SKPaint`.

bullets.lead: SKGLView implementation and text-blob APIs restored
bullets.detail: Implements `SKGLView` and re-adds the text-based `SKTextBlob` builders, cleans up `SKTextBlobBuilder`/`SKRunBuffer` and adds the R-Tree overload of `BeginRecording`.

bullets.lead: More Span<T> overloads across the surface
bullets.detail: Adds `Span<SKPoint>` overloads to `SKMatrix.MapPoints`/`MapVectors` and `SKPath.AddPoly`, span overloads on the color filters, `GetPixelSpan` with offsets, and a `Span`-based `SetRectRadii` overload.
Binds Skottie's animation builder so Lottie/Skottie animations can be constructed from managed code.
Migrates the P/Invoke surface to `LibraryImport` and function pointers where possible, and makes the `PlatformConfiguration` properties trimmable.

bullets.lead: Snapshot on Apple Metal no longer returns magenta
bullets.detail: Fixes `SKSurface.Snapshot` returning solid magenta on the Apple Metal backend.

bullets.lead: SKPaint clone disposal no longer AVEs
bullets.detail: Fixes an `AccessViolationException` when disposing a cloned `SKPaint`.
Ensures the canvas context is active when rendering, avoids failing on WASM when the canvas cannot be found, handles a null `XamlRoot` when the canvas unloads, and switches Uno Skia to Bgra8888.
Exposes DPI on the Blazor components so high-DPI scaling is correctly propagated to the canvas.
Fixes `GetKerningPairAdjustments` and floors outwards when converting to `SKRectI` so pixel-perfect rounding behaves.
Fixes memory leaks in the MAUI views so long-lived apps no longer accumulate native handles.
Reverts `SKBitmap.Encode` with `SKPngEncoderOptions` to the 2.88.8 behaviour so existing PNG encoding output stays byte-identical.

Fixes the WASM import path so SkiaSharp loads correctly from Blazor apps hosted under a base path, moves the workaround into the SkiaSharp WASM assets and pins the Windows SDK version deterministically.
Switches the Mac Catalyst backend to Metal and brings the Metal APIs to a common .NET TFM.
Moves the SDK, workloads and projects to .NET 8, and adds .NET 9 support so consumers can target the new runtime.
Adds native WebAssembly builds for multi-thread and SIMD variants so WASM consumers can pick the flavour that matches their host runtime.
Uses the new `GLControl` packages for the WinForms accelerated view.
Modernises the repository, splits packaging, validates the generated interop files, migrates to 1ES pipelines, and switches to the new license expressions.
Correctly packages managed runtime-only files and stops putting metadata into package versions so NuGet versions stay under the 64-character cap.
Builds ANGLE separately and makes sure the ANGLE bits reach the NuGet packages on Windows.
Disables and removes a raft of unused or problematic tools and dependencies so the shipping surface stays lean.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: Uno WASM/SKXamlCanvas fixes (context activation, canvas lookup, `XamlRoot`, nosimd builds) and added .NET 9 support
contributor_summaries.maxkatz6: Made `PlatformConfiguration` properties trimmable, brought Metal APIs to a common .NET TFM, and migrated to function pointers and `LibraryImport`
contributor_summaries.Youssef1313: Fixed `SKXamlCanvas` on Uno Skia to use Bgra8888, added the `Span<T>` overload of `SetRectRadii` and the `SKFilterQuality` compatibility overloads
contributor_summaries.beto-rodriguez: Exposed DPI on the Blazor components
contributor_summaries.jeremy-visionaid: Fixed the AccessViolationException when disposing a cloned `SKPaint`
contributor_summaries.taublast: Fixed `SKSurface.Snapshot` returning magenta on Apple Metal

preview_summaries.p6: Preview 6 added the `SKMatrix.MapPoints`/`MapVectors` and `SKPath.AddPoly` `Span<SKPoint>` overloads and picked up the multi-thread/SIMD WebAssembly builds.
preview_summaries.p5: Preview 5 cleaned up the `SKPngEncoderOptions` behaviour, added the `Span<SKPoint>` `SetRectRadii` overload and the `SKFilterQuality` compatibility overloads, and made sure ANGLE reaches the NuGet packages.
preview_summaries.p4: Preview 4 fixed the cloned-`SKPaint` AVE, added the R-Tree `BeginRecording` overload, moved to .NET 8, and cleaned up MAUI view memory leaks.
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 bumped Skia to m116, added `SKBlender`, `SKGLElement` for WPF, and switched Mac Catalyst to Metal.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 bound Skottie's animation builder, added Metal on Mac Catalyst and the `SKImage.ToRawShader` API.
preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 opened the v3 line — repository modernised, `[Obsolete]` members removed, text blobs restored, `SKGLView` implemented, WinUI accelerated views added, and Blazor DPI exposed.
